name: El Torito Sweet Corn Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the dough by combining 1/4 cup butter or margarine, 2 tablespoons shortening, and 1/2 cup masa harina in a bowl.
2. Mix in 3 tablespoons cold water to form a dough.
3. Add 10 ounces corn kernels and stir until evenly distributed.
4. Incorporate 3 tablespoons cornmeal, 1/4 cup sugar, 2 tablespoons whipping cream, 1/4 teaspoon baking powder, and 1/4 teaspoon salt.
5. Shape the mixture into a cake form and bake at 375°F (190°C) for about 30 minutes, or until golden brown.
6. Allow the cake to cool before serving.
